ABOUT WILD LEAP ATLANTA
We’re thrilled to bring our beloved craft beer, wine and spirits along with unique food offerings to downtown Atlanta! Wild Leap boasts a multi-level, 15,340 square-foot space just steps from Mercedes-Benz Stadium and State Farm Arena and a six-minute walk from Garnett MARTA station. Wild Leap joins the revitalization project of Downtown Atlanta, where retail shops, offices and more are bringing unique vibrancy to the historic area.
ARE YOU PET FRIENDLY?
kelseyads
2023-04-26T16:20:54-04:00
ARE YOU PET FRIENDLY?
We love your dogs! They are welcome on our patios, however the Department of Health requires they remain outdoors with the exception of service animals.
ARE YOU FAMILY FRIENDLY?
kelseyads
2023-04-26T16:21:02-04:00
ARE YOU FAMILY FRIENDLY?
Yes! We are an all ages, family friendly venue. We do require that all guests under 18 are accompanied by an adult at all times.
DO YOU SERVE FOOD?
kelseyads
2025-07-21T12:03:45-04:00
DO YOU SERVE FOOD?
We do! Midnyt Burger, owned and operated by Wild Leap, is on site 7 days a week serving up delicious smashburgers, loaded fries, chicken tenders, kids meals, fried oreos and more! We serve food daily from 11am.
WHERE CAN WE PARK?
kelseyads
2023-04-26T16:21:46-04:00
WHERE CAN WE PARK?
We have limited complimentary retail parking seven days a week. There is also a large paid lot directly across the street from us on the corner of Ted Turner Drive SW and Nelson Street.
Here’s how to access our complimentary parking:
Search “
Wild Leap Atlanta
” in Google Maps and follow the directions to get there.
If you see the Wild Leap / Lofts at Centennial Yards building on your right, drive past the stop light at the Peters street bridge and make an immediate curved right under the bridge into a parking lot.
This parking is for both for residents of the apartment and retail visitors. Please look for the signage straight ahead outlining where the retail spots begin.

--- Page: /ready-to-drink-vodka-cocktails ---
Ready To Drink Vodka Cocktails By Wild Leap | LaGrange Georgia
Ready To Drink Vodka Cocktails
kelseyads
2024-12-02T17:17:42-05:00
Ready-To-Drink Vodka Cocktails
Wild Leap Ready-To-Drink Vodka Cocktails are available throughout the Southeast! With three ounces of Wild Leap vodka in every can, these little beauties pack a punch at 10% alcohol by volume! These flavors were originally created as handcrafted cocktails in our taproom and were so incredibly popular, we decided to put them into cans and bring to the masses!
STRAWBERRY • MANGO • LEMON
A Wild Leap original vodka cocktail in a can! Strawberry Mango features a generous 3 ounces of vodka along with strawberry, mango, lemon and natural flavors for a flavorful, ready-to-drink cocktail.
ORANGE • MINT • LIME
A Wild Leap original vodka cocktail in a can! Creamsicle Mojito features a generous 3 ounces of vodka along with orange, mint, lime and natural flavors for that classic mojito taste.
ESPRESSO • MARTINI • PREMIUM
A Wild Leap original vodka cocktail in a can! Espresso Martini features a generous 3 ounces of vodka for a flavorful, ready-to-drink cocktail.
GRAPEFRUIT • PEACH • PREMIUM
A Wild Leap original vodka cocktail in a can! Grapefruit Peach Premium Ready-To-Drink cocktail is a delicious blend of Wild Leap Vodka, sparkling water, and natural flavors.
BLACKBERRY • LEMONADE • PREMIUM
A Wild Leap original vodka cocktail in a can, Blackberry Lemonade Premium Ready-To-Drink is a delicious blend of Wild Leap Vodka, sparkling water, and natural flavors.

MYGOTU Ready-To-Drink Premium Cocktails By Wild Leap | Georgia
MYGOTU Ready To Drink Premium Cocktails
kelseyads
2022-03-13T20:43:17-04:00
FIND IT
Sunshine, beach vibes and summer nights in every sip.
MYGOTU Premium Cocktails are handcrafted with love and spiked for satisfaction at 5% alcohol by volume. With only one gram of carbs at 100 calories per can, this 12-ounce gluten-free, keto-friendly drink is available in ambrosial Raspberry Lemonade, Pineapple Passionfruit and Grapefruit Peach flavors. Grab a variety pack for your next gathering and find out why your new go-to is MYGOTU.
Channel the tropics with this wildly satisfying premium cocktail. The juicy pairing of sweet pineapple and exotic passionfruit brings the beach to your doorstep. This Wild Leap original may be too good to share. Keep cool and grab extras!
MORE INFO
FIND IT
MYGOTU is Peach State proud with our newest Grapefruit Peach libation. There’s nothing quite like a cool cocktail on a sunny day shared with friends. The delicious blend of grapefruit and peach makes this Wild Leap original a flavor to savor!
MORE INFO
FIND IT
This ain’t your mama’s lemonade. The delectable combination of tart raspberry and fresh lemon make this Wild Leap original a perfect BBQ companion. Pairs well with all your cookout favorites.
MORE INFO
FIND IT

--- Page: /about-wild-leap ---
About Us - Wild Leap Brew Co.
About Us
kelseyads
2021-06-23T09:03:30-04:00
The Wild Leap story begins when two beer-impassioned friends and a talented brewer take a wild leap (yep!) of faith to open their own brewery. Leaving behind successful and comfortable careers, this trio begins introducing approachable and inventive styles of craft beer. In September 2017, Wild Leap officially opens its doors in downtown LaGrange, Georgia and the big wheels keep on turnin’ today!
After being awarded Best New Brewery of 2019 by USA Today’s 10 Best Readers Choice Awards, owners Anthony Rodriguez and Rob Goldstein along with expert brewer Chris Elliott, extended their passion into spirits and Wild Leap Vodka was born. To the delight of fans, Wild Leap began serving handcrafted cocktails in their taproom along with award-winning craft beer. The Wild Leap taproom had become something of a local gathering place where friends and neighbors sipped on deliciously created beverages while listening to music, playing games and enjoying lively camaraderie.
When COVID-19 shuttered their taproom in spring of 2020, Wild Leap pivoted into cocktails-to-go, offering curbside pickup. Customers began trekking to LaGrange to stock up on these pandemic essentials, prompting Wild Leap to launch a line of Ready-To-Drink premium craft cocktails, available to vodka fans throughout Georgia.
The Wild Leap story is young and is still being written, but you know what they say, “If you don’t do wild things when you’re young, you’ll have nothing to smile about when you’re old.”
In the days before Wild Leap, Rob and Anthony held established, successful careers in the events and craft beer world. The two met during a networking event, and as one thing led to another, they eventually worked together to throw a New Year’s Eve bash in a local Atlanta brewery. These two quickly developed a panache for staging large-scale and successful events in Atlanta including craft beer festivals, mixers, live music performances and much more.
The plot takes a twist when the two decide to throw a craft beer festival in LaGrange, Georgia. Staged in the historic downtown area, the festival was something of a litmus test to gauge local interest in craft beer and potentially a locale for launching a new brewery.
The turnout was staggering. The festival drew thousands to this small Georgia town and just like that, a craft beer scene was born in LaGrange.
Now knowing LaGrange was where they needed to be, the search for the perfect location was underway. Anthony recalled seeing an old building he’d pointed out while in LaGrange on business. “That would make a really cool spot for a brewery,” he commented when laying eyes on the Westbrook Service & Tire Co. building, a historic property on the edge of downtown that was in need of some love.
After revisiting the site, Rob and Anthony had their hearts set and their minds made up. This was the spot.
